title: pittosporum ferrugineum var. moluccanum
intro: Pittosporum ferrugineum var. moluccanum, also known as the yellow flowered kohuhu, is a plant species native to New Zealand and the Pacific region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The leaves and bark of Pittosporum ferrugineum var. moluccanum are used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits like antioxidant and anti-arthritic effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to alleviate symptoms and promote well-being.
